---
title: "Business Indicators"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r}
#| label: Personal Consumption
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(plotly)

spending <- readRDS("data/fred_spending.rds")

fig <- plot_ly(spending, x = ~date)
fig <- fig %>% add_lines(y = ~disposable_income, name = "Disposable Income")
fig <- fig %>% add_lines(y = ~durable_goods, name = "Durable Goods")
fig <- fig %>% add_lines(y = ~nondurable_goods, name = "Nondurable Goods")
fig <- fig %>% add_lines(y = ~services, name = "Services")

fig <- fig %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = paste(
        "Real Personal Consumption Expenditures and Disposable Personal Income",
        "<br><sup>Seasonally Adjusted</sup>"
      )
    ),
    shapes = list(
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2007-12-01",
        x1 = "2009-06-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      ),
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2020-02-01",
        x1 = "2020-04-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      )
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      title = "Date"
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title = "Billions of Chained 2017 Dollars"
    ),
    annotations = list(
      list(
        text = "<b>Source</b>: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA), FRED",
        xref = "paper",
        yref = "paper",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.30,
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 10)
      ),
      list(
        x = "2008-09-01",
        y = 0.95,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        text = "Great Recession",
        showarrow = FALSE,
        font = list(size = 10)
      ),
    
      list(
        x = "2020-03-01",
        y = 0.95,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        text = "COVID Recession",
        showarrow = FALSE,
        font = list(size = 10)
      )
    ),
    margin = list(
      t = 80,
      b = 120
    )
  )

config(
  fig,
  displayModeBar = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#| label: Vehicle Sales and Fuel Prices
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(plotly)

autoFuel <- readRDS("data/vehicleSalesFuelPrices.rds") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2007-01-01")) %>%
  mutate(
    value.y = as.numeric(value.y)
  )

fig <- plot_ly(autoFuel, x = ~date)

fig <- fig %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~value.x,
    name = "Light Vehicle Sales",
    yaxis = "y1"
  )

fig <- fig %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~value.y,
    name = "Fuel Prices",
    yaxis = "y2"
  )

fig %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = "Light Vehicle Sales and Fuel Prices<br><sup>United States, Monthly Data Since 2007</sup>"
    ),
    
    shapes = list(
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2007-12-01",
        x1 = "2009-06-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      ),
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2020-02-01",
        x1 = "2020-04-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      )
    ),

    xaxis = list(
      title = "Date",
      showline = TRUE,
      linewidth = 1
    ),

    yaxis = list(
      title = "Light Vehicle Sales (Millions)",
      side = "left",
      range = c(1,20)
    ),

    yaxis2 = list(
      title = "Fuel Prices ($ per Gallon)",
      overlaying = "y",
      side = "right",
      range = c(1,20)
    ),

    legend = list(
      x = 1.05,
      y = 1,
      xanchor = "left"
    ),

    annotations = list(
      list(
        text = "<b>Source</b>: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA), Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED)",
        xref = "paper",
        yref = "paper",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.25,
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 10)
      ),
       list(
        x = "2008-09-01",
        y = 0.95,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        text = "Great Recession",
        showarrow = FALSE,
        font = list(size = 10)
      ),
    
      list(
        x = "2020-03-01",
        y = 0.95,
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        text = "COVID Recession",
        showarrow = FALSE,
        font = list(size = 10)
      )
    ),

    margin = list(
      t = 60,
      b = 100,
      r = 120
    )
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)


```

```{r}
#| label: GDP Percent Change
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(plotly)

gdp <- readRDS("data/gdpPercentChange.rds") %>%
  mutate(TimePeriod = as.Date(paste0(TimePeriod, "-01-01")))

mi_gdp <- gdp %>%
  select(TimePeriod, Michigan_GDP_percent_change) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(TimePeriod)

counties <- unique(gdp$GeoName)
init <- counties[1]

p <- plot_ly()

for (cty in counties) {

  df <- gdp %>% filter(GeoName == cty)

  p <- p %>%
    add_lines(
      data = df,
      x = ~TimePeriod,
      y = ~GDP_percent_change,
      name = cty,
      visible = (cty == init),
      line = list(color = "steelblue"),
      legendgroup = "county"
    )
}

p <- p %>%
  add_lines(
    data = mi_gdp,
    x = ~TimePeriod,
    y = ~Michigan_GDP_percent_change,
    name = "Michigan",
    line = list(color = "black", dash = "dash"),
    inherit = FALSE
  )

buttons <- lapply(seq_along(counties), function(i) {

  vis <- rep(FALSE, length(counties) + 1)
  vis[i] <- TRUE
  vis[length(vis)] <- TRUE  # Michigan always visible

  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(visible = vis),
      list(title = paste("GDP Growth Rate:", counties[i], "vs Michigan"))
    ),
    label = counties[i]
  )
})

p %>%
  layout(
    title = paste("GDP Growth Rate:", init, "vs Michigan"),

    xaxis = list(
      title = "Year",
      type = "date",
      tickformat = "%Y",
      dtick = "M12"
    ),

    yaxis = list(
      title = "GDP Percent Change"
    ),

    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        buttons = buttons,
        x = 1.4,
        y = 0.75,
        xanchor = "right"
      )
    ),
    
    annotations = list(
      list(
        text = "<b>Source</b>: US BEA (table CAGDP1), Upjohn Regional.",
        xref = "paper",
        yref = "paper",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.25,
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 10)
      )),

    legend = list(
      x = 1.05,
      y = 1,
      xanchor = "left"
    ),

    margin = list(
      r = 200,
      t = 30,
      b = 100
    )
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#| label: Business Applications Change From a Year Ago
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

biz <- readRDS("data/businessAppChange.rds") %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(Date)

fig <- plot_ly(biz, x = ~Date)

fig <- fig %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~Michigan,
    name = "Michigan"
  )

fig <- fig %>%
  add_lines(
    y = ~United_States,
    name = "United States",
    line = list(dash = "dash")
  )

fig %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = "Business Applications Growth Rate<br><sup>Michigan vs United States</sup>"
    ),

    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      showline = TRUE
    ),

    yaxis = list(
      title = "Percent Change",
      ticksuffix = "%",
      zeroline = TRUE,
      zerolinecolor = "gray"
    ),

    legend = list(
      x = 1.05,
      y = 1,
      xanchor = "left"
    ),

    shapes = list(

      # Great Recession
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2007-12-01",
        x1 = "2009-06-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      ),

      # COVID recession
      list(
        type = "rect",
        xref = "x",
        yref = "paper",
        x0 = "2020-02-01",
        x1 = "2020-04-01",
        y0 = 0,
        y1 = 1,
        fillcolor = "lightgray",
        opacity = 0.3,
        line = list(width = 0),
        layer = "below"
      )
    ),

    annotations = list(
      list(
        text = "<b>Source</b>: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis (series BUSAPPWNSAMIYY and BUSAPPWNSAUS), Upjohn Institute, Updated February 2026.",
        xref = "paper",
        yref = "paper",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.25,
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 10)
      )
    ),

    margin = list(
      t = 60,
      b = 100
    )
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#| label: Average Annual Wage
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false


```
